# rust-atty0.2

Fedora 44 compatibility package for the published `atty 0.2.14` crate used by
ast-grep. Fedora 43 already provides this branch. Generated with rust2rpm 28
and a clean Fedora 44 x86_64 mock build passed. The package targets Fedora 44
and Rawhide on both `x86_64` and `aarch64`; Fedora 43 remains omitted because
it already provides this branch.
